invariant: Concurrent get_daily_readiness composition dedupes only within the same workspace_scope; identical subject ids in another workspace use a distinct key.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = three concurrent ws-alpha invocations have identical composition ids, and ws-beta composition ids differ by workspace_scope. FAIL = workspace_scope is absent from child cache/provenance keys.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds duplicate same-user invocations plus a second workspace with matching subject ids to catch workspace-agnostic cache keys.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Records the expected stable and cross-workspace-distinct composition ids.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Synthetic canonical replay key for the concurrency daily readiness narrative.
